decontamination_notes: Real feature from honojs/hono PR #4921 (fixes issue #4920), merged 2026-05-16, after model training cutoffs. Adds bytes(): Promise<Uint8Array> to HonoRequest, wired through the private #cachedBody mechanism so the body can be read multiple times; a naive this.raw.bytes() implementation fails the multiple-read test because the raw stream is consumed. Hono is a zero-runtime-dependency TypeScript package; its source uses extensionless ESM imports, so hidden tests run via tsx (pinned in the node-ts sandbox image) with the built-in node:test runner. Repo sliced at the PR base commit (71k LOC src tree, bytes() absent); MIT LICENSE preserved. Coverage floor: 4 fail_to_pass tests (content, binary payload, cached multiple reads, empty body) plus a bytes-independent regression guard over json()/text()/arrayBuffer().

fail_to_pass.name: bytes_content
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb bytes returns Uint8Array of the body$' vb_request_bytes.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: bytes_binary
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb bytes preserves binary content$' vb_request_bytes.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: bytes_cached_body
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb bytes uses the cached body \(multiple reads work\)$' vb_request_bytes.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: parsers_unaffected
pass_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb existing body parsers unaffected$' vb_regression.test.ts
